outline.summary: arXiv:2503.06337v4  [cs.LG]  12 Jun 2025 Pretraining Generative Flow Networks with Inexpensive Rewards for Molecular Graph Generation Mohit Pandey 1 Gopeshh Subbaraj 2 Artem Cherkasov 1 Martin Ester 3 Emmanuel Bengio 4 Abstract Generative Flow Networks (GFlowNets) have recently emerged as a suitable framework for gener…

Pretraining Generative Flow Networks with Inexpensive Rewards for Molecular Graph Generation can be effectively reused for multiple downstream tasks, often outperforming traditional methods. Recent advancements in GFlowNets have also introduced unsupervised pre-training strategies, such as the outcome-conditioned GFlow…
